name: The Wurzels
description: '''The Wurzels''' are an English [[Scrumpy and Western]] band from the [[West Country]] county of [[Somerset]], founded by [[Adge Cutler]] and band manager John Miles in 1966.   Best known for their 1976 hits [[List of Number 1 Hits (UK)|UK Number One]] "[[The Combine Harvester]]" and UK Number Three "[[I Am a Cider Drinker]]", they have continually performed for nearly 50 years through multiple lineup changes.
